title: Wind Charged Weaponry
description: Wind Charged Weaponry adds a few new weapons and combat-related items with an emphasis on positioning and movement.
body:
## **THIS MOD IS STILL IN DEVELOPMENT, EVERYTHING SHOWN HERE IS SUBJECT TO CHANGE**

### NOTE: This page is currently undergoing a re-write complete with a new version once the re-write is done.

### Current Additions:
- Ceremonial Longsword
  - A large sword with slightly increased range and at the cost of only dealing 7 damage as opposed to the 8 damage of a Netherite Sword while also being marginally slower.
  - On right click, players can use the Ceremonial Longsword to block attacks.
    - When blocking with a Wind Gauntet in the offhand, blocking has no time limit and allows the user to move faster.
  - When enchanted with Gust, targets are launched into the air.

![The large texture of a Ceremonial Longsword (shown when held in the hand of an entity)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5ac219d41cf30e309810dcc5ec00cd39bc6d13ff.png)
- Wind Gauntlet
  - Can be held to charge a small burst of air which, when released, can launch both the user as well as anything else caught in the blast. Furthermore, a user can crouch to avoid being pushed by the device.
  - When enchanted with Blast, the wind burst is replaced with a much more powerful explosion that both launches and damages anything in the area, including its user. Another thing to consider about the Blast enchantment is that it removes the user's ability to crouch to avoid knockback, adding an extra element of danger to its use.
  - Include the phrase "plasma power" in the name of the item to activate a secret cosmetic appearance.

![A Wind Gauntlet at the same angle as when viewed in the inventory](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8e52b3b987feab82a8f3a60fda35155b48b54e1b.png)
- Needle
  - Similar to the Ceremonial Longsword but with different stats and the unique ability to gather silk when attacking an enemy.
  - When at full silk, the user can hold right click to heal 10hp (5 hearts).
  - When enchanted with Reaping, the Needle deals more damage and gathers more silk per-hit at the cost of attack speed.
  - When enchanted with Thread Storm, the Needle's healing functionality is replaced with a low-damage AOE attack that holds enemies in place.

![The Needle when held in the hand of a player](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0255beeced6bcf9f0eefba6eb21c206f7174f095.png)
